intended_use: EpiMonitor is a prescription only medical device system composed of a wearable device "EmbracePlus" and paired mobile software application "EpiMonitor" intended as an adjunct to seizure monitoring in
intended_use_full: EpiMonitor is a prescription only medical device system composed of a wearable device "EmbracePlus" and paired mobile software application "EpiMonitor" intended as an adjunct to seizure monitoring in adults and children aged 6 and up in a home environment or healthcare facilities. The device is worn on the wrist and senses Electrodermal Activity (EDA) and motion data to detect patterns that may be associated with either primary or secondary generalized tonic clonic seizures in patients with epilepsy or at risk of having epilepsy.
target_condition: Generalized tonic-clonic seizures in patients with epilepsy or at risk of having epilepsy
ground_truth: Adjudicated tonic-clonic seizure data from Epilepsy Monitoring Units with gold-standard video-EEG methodology, and real-world longitudinal data from Embrace2 wearable device
other_metrics: Positive Percentage Agreement (PPA) for Low-Sensitivity Mode: pediatric (6-21 years) 0.895 (corrected 0.791, CI 0.619-0.925); adult (>21 years) 1.000 (corrected 0.905, CI 0.891-0.917). False Alarm Rate (FAR) per 24 hours for Low-Sensitivity Mode: pediatric 0.70 (CI 0.41-1.06); adult 0.28 (CI 0.15-0.46). Real-world PPA: pediatric 0.87 (corrected 0.86, CI 0.78-0.92); adult 0.80 (corrected 0.77, CI 0.64-0.87). Real-world FAR: pediatric 0.34 (CI 0.23-0.50); adult 0.25 (CI 0.22-0.30).
